archetype_description: Japanese Heritage & Dojo. Warm, tactile, disciplined, minimalist.

headings.style_notes: Use for all H1, H2, H3. Evokes traditional ink strokes and heritage.

body.style_notes: Clean, highly legible for dense dashboard data and marketing copy.

accent.style_notes: Use exclusively for QR codes, ID numbers, access codes, and payment ledgers.

marketing.grid: Bento 'Tetris' Grid (Mode A) - Wide gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetrical layout.
marketing.padding: Generous sections (py-24, py-32). Containers have internal p-8 or p-12.

dashboard.grid: Control Room Grid (Mode B) - Tight gap-4 or gap-6. Dense data presentation.
dashboard.padding: Strict p-4 to p-6 for widgets. Maximize viewport utility.
dashboard.style: Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). Grid Borders (visible skeleton).

buttons.style: Sharp-cornered rectangle or perfectly pill-shaped. No in-between.
buttons.hover: Subtle scale down (scale-95) and bg color darken. Add a 1px border on secondary buttons.

cards.marketing: Cardless or completely flat with a subtle 1px border (#E0DCD0) and no shadow. Let the content breathe.
cards.dashboard: Flat background, 1px border, no shadow. Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm).
cards.id_card: The 'Tactile' variant. Needs to look like a physical belt-rank certificate. Heavy drop-shadow (shadow-2xl), #F7F5F0 background, elegant border, incorporating the QR/Barcode.

navigation.style: Solid background or very heavy crystal glassmorphism (bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl) to ensure legibility.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Elements should have intentional, crisp transitions (e.g. border color changes from light grey to charcoal).
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up (opacity + slight Y-translate) using framer-motion. Keep it calm, like drawing a breath before a kata.

images.description: Sunlight streams into a traditional japanese room. Use with max bg-black/40 overlay.
Traditional ink wash painting of a mountainous landscape. Use as subtle background texture.
A grand hall. Great for programs or about section.
Man holding a sword / sensei figure. Use for About Sensei section.
Background texture pattern for ID cards or premium sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a hybrid application: Public marketing pages + 3 Role-based dashboards.
Database: Set up roles (super_admin, admin, student). Students require an 'access_code' provided by an admin to register.
Marketing Pages: Home, About Sensei, Programs, Schedule, News, Contact. Use the Bento Grid for layout. Inject the provided media assets.
Auth Flow: Login and Registration. Registration requires an access code check.
Student Dashboard: Profile view, ID Card visual (implement qrcode.react and react-barcode), Payments Due, Payment History, Class Schedule.
Admin Dashboard: Manage Students (CRUD, update basic settings), Generate/Manage Access Codes, Record/Manage Payments.
Super Admin Dashboard: Manage Admins and Students, CMS Editor (manage content for public marketing pages), Global Payments Overview, Global Access Codes.
ID Card Feature: Design a certificate-like ID card that displays the user's QR code and Barcode prominently. Use heavy shadow and rice-paper style background.
Testing: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements, buttons, and form inputs (e.g. `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).
Tailwind: Do NOT use rounded-xl or large border radiuses. Use rounded-none or rounded-sm to maintain the traditional disciplined Dojo feel.
Typography: Use Cormorant Garamond for headings (tracking-tight) and Outfit for body. Use Space Mono for numeric data like access codes.
